dimensions.name: Revenue Quality Analysis
dimensions.justification: Excellent volume vs. price/mix decomposition with exact figures from MD&A for all three years. Complete geographic segment breakdown with all 6 segments reconciling to totals. Concentrate vs. finished product revenue mix quantified with trend analysis showing shift from 49% to 52% concentrate. Strong analyst commentary on hyperinflationary markets and refranchising impact.

dimensions.name: Cash Economics Analysis
dimensions.justification: Complete cash flow build from Net Income through FCF for all years. FCF/NI conversion ratios calculated. Working capital metrics computed (DSO, DIO, DPO, CCC showing negative ~46-49 days). IRS tax litigation deposit correctly identified and adjusted. Shareholder returns vs. reinvestment fully quantified with dividends and buybacks.

dimensions.name: Valuation Context
dimensions.justification: Market cap and enterprise value correctly computed with transparent net debt methodology including minority interests. All relevant multiples present (P/E, EV/EBITDA, EV/EBIT, FCF Yield, Dividend Yield). KO vs. PEP and S&P 500 price returns for both 1-year and 3-year windows with correct endpoints. All values properly sourced.

dimensions.name: Data Sourcing & Documentation
dimensions.justification: Every data input has precise filing references including form types, fiscal years, and specific statement/note citations. Filing dates and accession numbers provided. Clear distinction between GAAP and non-GAAP measures. Analyst assumptions clearly labeled. Sign conventions documented for cash flow presentation.

dimensions.name: Visual Hierarchy & Readability
dimensions.justification: Well-organized with clear section headers and structured tables. Consistent number formatting with proper units ($mm, %, etc.). Analyst commentary clearly separated from data. Minor formatting could be enhanced but overall very readable and professional.

dimensions.name: Completeness vs. Task Requirements
dimensions.justification: All three tabs present and comprehensive. Tab 1 fully addresses volume/price decomposition, geographic diversification, and concentrate vs. finished product mix. Tab 2 covers earnings-to-cash conversion, capital intensity, shareholder returns, and working capital. Tab 3 provides market cap, EV, multiples, and price comparisons as required.

summary: This is institutional-quality analysis ready for a PM's desk. The workbook demonstrates exceptional analytical rigor with complete data sourcing, precise filing references, and comprehensive coverage of all required topics. The revenue quality analysis provides deep insights into KO's price-driven growth strategy, cash economics analysis properly handles the IRS deposit adjustment, and valuation context offers relevant multiples with peer comparisons. Professional presentation with clear documentation makes this highly actionable for investment decision-making.
